rule.badWeightSum: The sum of all service weights must be 100.
rule.noUpstreams: At least one target service is required.

modelMapping.mappingTargetPlaceholder_full: If left empty, the model name in the request will be used.

notice.pluginConfigReadonly: Detect rules, replace rules, system dictionary settings, and audit sink settings are managed only from the AI Desensitization Management page and cannot be edited in the plugin configuration page.

placeholders.replacePreset: Select a preset to prefill the rule
placeholders.detectPreset: Select a preset to prefill the detect rule
placeholders.denyJsonpath: One JSONPath per line, for example $.messages[*].content
placeholders.denyMessage: The question or answer contains sensitive content and has been blocked.
placeholders.denyRawMessage: {"errmsg":"The request contains sensitive content and has been blocked."}

messages.auditQueryFailed: Failed to query audit records. Please check your login status or the backend service.

apiKey.label: API Key Detect
apiKey.description: Detect OpenAI style keys prefixed with sk-.

mobilePhone.label: Mobile Detect
mobilePhone.description: Detect mobile phone numbers with a GROK pattern.

email.label: Email Detect
email.description: Detect email addresses with a GROK pattern.

idCard.label: ID Card Detect
idCard.description: Detect ID card numbers with a GROK pattern.

replacePreset.help: Selecting a preset prefills the recommended matching rule. For numeric data, a single-character replace value keeps the first 3 digits and the last 1 digit while filling the middle digits with that character.

mobilePhone.label: Mobile Phone Masking
mobilePhone.description: Matches 11-digit mainland China mobile phone numbers and preserves the first 3 digits and last 1 digit.

email.label: Email Masking
email.description: Matches email addresses and replaces them with a placeholder.

bankCard.label: Bank Card Masking
bankCard.description: Matches 16 to 19 digit bank card numbers and masks the middle digits.

ip.label: IP Masking
ip.description: Matches IPv4 addresses and restores the original value in the response.

idCard.label: ID Card Masking
idCard.description: Matches ID card numbers and replaces them with a fixed placeholder.

apiKey.label: API Key Hash
apiKey.description: Matches sk- prefixed keys and replaces them with a recoverable hash.

messagesContent.label: User Request Content
messagesContent.description: Matches every `content` field in OpenAI `messages`, which works well for multi-turn chat requests.

userMessages.label: User Message Content
userMessages.description: Matches only messages with `role=user`, which is useful when you only want to inspect user input.

systemPrompt.label: System Prompt
systemPrompt.description: Matches system messages in `messages` and the root-level `system` field.

responsesInput.label: Responses API Input
responsesInput.description: Matches `input[].content[].text` in the Responses API. AI response content is handled by OpenAI conversation interception instead of JSONPath.

systemConfig.title: System Dictionary
systemConfig.dictionaryHelp: The system dictionary comes from the plugin's built-in file. This page no longer expands the full dictionary and only supports keyword lookup.
systemConfig.searchPlaceholder: Enter a keyword to check whether it exists in the system dictionary
systemConfig.searchHint: This section only performs lookup and does not render the full dictionary content.
systemConfig.searchMatched: The system dictionary contains entries related to "{keyword}"
systemConfig.searchNotFound: No entries related to "{keyword}" were found in the system dictionary
systemConfig.searchResultTruncated: Only the first {count} matched entries are shown.

runtime.bindingHelp: This section shows which AI routes are currently bound to `ai-data-masking`. Plugin enablement follows the AI route policy binding instead of a separate global switch on this page.
runtime.scopeHelp: OpenAI mode processes conversation content by default. JSONPath and raw body interception can be enabled as needed.
runtime.responseHelp: When sensitive content is found in the selected processing scope, the request is blocked and the configured response is returned.

aiQuota.empty: No AI routes have ai-quota enabled yet
aiQuota.amountOnlyEmpty: No AI routes are currently running AI quota in amount mode

mode.amountDescription: This route is running in amount mode. The page shows user wallet balances, the form accepts RMB, and values are converted to micro_yuan before syncing to the Portal wallet and Redis runtime cache.
mode.tokenDescription: This route is still in token mode. The page shows runtime token quotas stored in Redis.

form.amountValueHelp: The form accepts RMB and converts it to micro_yuan before submission.

form.cronHelp: Use Spring cron format, for example 0 0 0 * * * runs at midnight every day.
form.amountValueHelp: In amount mode, the value is entered in RMB and converted to micro_yuan when executed.

policy.title: User Amount Limit Policy
policy.description: This drawer configures the user-level amount policy shared by all API keys of the selected user, including total, 5-hour, daily, weekly and monthly windows. Values are entered in RMB and converted to micro_yuan on save.

form.dailyResetTimeHelp: Phase 1 only supports a fixed daily boundary in HH:mm format.
form.costResetAtHelp: Leave empty to keep the current value. Enter yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm in your browser local time and it will be submitted as UTC automatically, or provide an RFC3339 timestamp directly.
form.amountHelp: The form accepts RMB and converts it to micro_yuan before submission.

validation.policyDailyResetTimeRequired: Please input the daily reset time
validation.policyDailyResetTimeInvalid: The daily reset time must match HH:mm

domainForm.name: Domain
domainForm.nameTooltip: Both full domain (e.g.: hello.com) and wildcard domain (e.g.: *.hello.com) are supported. Manage the protocol and certificates for a given domain independently here. And route configurations can isolate with each other by different domains.
domainForm.protocolTooltip: Following protocols are supported: HTTP (port 80) and HTTPS (port 443) protocols. An SSL certificate must be specified when using HTTPS protocol.
domainForm.certificateTooltip: Only certificates provided by SSL Certificates Service of Alibaba Clound are supported now.
domainForm.mustHttpsTooltip: Only certificates provided by SSL Certificates Service of Alibaba Clound are supported now.
domainForm.mustHttpsCheckboxTooltip: Only HTTPS (port 443) service is available. Requests sent to HTTP (port 80) service will be redirected to the corresponding HTTPS (port 443) service

dashboard.loadFailed: Error occurs when loading dashboard data. Please refresh the page later.
dashboard.uninitialized: Built-in dashboard is not intialized automatically.Click the button below to initialize it manually.
dashboard.noBuiltInDashboard: Built-in native monitoring is not enabled. This page no longer embeds external Grafana.

native.quickRangeHint: Use presets to fill the start time while keeping the current end time.
native.invalidTimeRange: Please choose a valid start time and end time.

configNotes.brief: It is recommended to configure the Aigateway dashboard with Prometheus + Grafana.
configNotes.item1_k8s: When adding Prometheus collection configurations to get metrics of Higress Gateway Pods, please add following relabel_config items:
configNotes.item1_standalone: You can use the following URL in Prometheus to get metrics of Higress Gateway: http://{GatewayIP}:{MetricsPort}/stats/prometheus The default value of MetricsPort is 15020.
configNotes.item2: Configure Grafana so dashboard can be displayed within this page.
configNotes.item2_1: If configured with grafana.ini, please add following items into the file:
configNotes.item2_2: If configured with environment variables, please configure following variables:
configNotes.item3: We recommend using the built-in Aigateway dashboard configuration. You can input the UID of the Prometheus data source in Grafana and download the JSON configuration file for import. (<1>How to obtain the UID of a data source?</1>)
configNotes.item3_dataSourceId_required: Please input Prometheus Data Source UID.
configNotes.item4: Input the HTTPS URL of Grafana is highly recommended to ensure the dashboard can be shown with in this page correctly.

agentCatalog.optionsLoadFailed: Failed to load MCP server options. Existing catalog entries are still available.

help.pricingCurrency: Phase 1 billing uses RMB only. Portal deducts balances by RMB amount and token pricing.
help.inputPer1K: Enter the RMB unit price for every 1K input tokens. The value is synced into Portal billing tables after save.
help.outputPer1K: Enter the RMB unit price for every 1K output tokens. The value is synced into Portal billing tables after save.
help.inputCostPerToken: Enter the RMB unit price for each input token. The effective billing price is materialized into Portal runtime tables on save.
help.outputCostPerToken: Enter the RMB unit price for each output token. The effective billing price is materialized into Portal runtime tables on save.
help.cachePricingFallback: Cache pricing fields are optional. If omitted, the system falls back to the configured base token pricing chain.

label.failoverEnabledExtra: If enabled, when the count of failed requests with a certain auth token exceeds the threshold, Aigateway will stop sending requests with it until following health check requests get a certain number of successes.
label.failureThreshold: Min Consecuitive Failures to Mark Down a Token
label.successThreshold: Min Consecuitive Sucesses to Mark Up a Token
label.qwenEnableSearch: Enable Tongyi Qianwen Internet search function
label.vertexTokenRefreshAhead: Lead time of rereshing Google Cloud Access Token (sec)

rules.inputPer1KRequired: Please input the RMB unit price for every 1K input tokens
rules.outputPer1KRequired: Please input the RMB unit price for every 1K output tokens
rules.inputCostPerTokenRequired: Please input the RMB unit price for each input token
rules.outputCostPerTokenRequired: Please input the RMB unit price for each output token
rules.serviceNameNoSlash: Slashes (/) are not allowed in name
rules.failureThresholdRequired: Please input min consecuitive failures to mark down a token
rules.healthCheckTimeoutRequired: Please input health check request timeout (ms)
rules.healthCheckIntervalRequired: Please input health check request interval (ms)
rules.healthCheckModelRequired: Please input health check request LLM model
rules.successThresholdRequired: Please input min consecuitive sucesses to mark up a token
rules.volcengineBaseUrlRequired: Please input a valid Ark base URL
rules.volcengineBaseUrlNoPort: Ark base URL must not include a custom port
rules.volcengineBaseUrlNoQuery: Ark base URL must not contain query parameters or fragments
rules.retryOnFailureMaxRetriesRequired: Please input a valid max retry count
rules.retryOnFailureTimeoutRequired: Please input a valid retry timeout (ms)
rules.openaiCustomUrlRequired: Please input a valid custom OpenAI service base URL
rules.openaiCustomUrlMultipleValuesWithIpOnly: Only URLs with IP and port are supported when specifying multiple custom OpenAI service base URLs
rules.openaiCustomUrlInconsistentProtocols: Inconsistent protocols found in custom OpenAI service base URLs
rules.openaiCustomUrlInconsistentContextPaths: Inconsistent paths found in custom OpenAI service base URLs
rules.openaiCustomServicePathRequired: Please select custom OpenAI service path
rules.qwenFileIdRequired: Please input Tongyi Qianwen file ID
rules.qwenDomainRequired: Please input a valid custom Tongyi Qianwen domain
rules.awsAccessKeyRequired: Please input AWS Access Key ID
rules.awsSecretKeyRequired: Please input AWS Secret Access Key
rules.vertexProjectIdRequired: Please input Google Cloud Product ID
rules.vertexAuthKeyRequired: Please input  Google Cloud Service Account Key
rules.vertexAuthKeyBadFormat: Invalid Google Cloud service account key format, which must be a JSON string.
rules.vertexAuthKeyBadRequiredProperty: Required property is missing in the Google Cloud service account key: {key}

tooltips.qwenFileIdsTooltip: The file IDs uploaded to Dashscope via the file API. The file contents will be used as contextual input for AI conversations.
tooltips.qwenEnableCompatibleTooltip: When Tongyi Qianwen compatibility mode is enabled, requests will be sent to Tongyi Qianwen's OpenAI-compatible API endpoint, and no modifications will be applied to the request or response payloads.
tooltips.vertexTokenRefreshAheadTooltip: The lead time in seconds of refreshing the access token used to send requests to Vertex API. Leave it blank if the token shall only be refreshed after expired.
tooltips.zhipuDomainTooltip: Custom domain for Zhipu AI service. Leave empty to use the default domain (open.bigmodel.cn). Use 'api.z.ai' for international service.
tooltips.zhipuCodePlanModeTooltip: Enable Code Plan mode for optimized code generation capabilities.
tooltips.claudeCodeModeTooltip: Enable Claude Code mode to use OAuth token authentication instead of API key. Run 'claude setup-token' to get your OAuth token.
tooltips.retryOnFailureStatusTextTooltip: Use comma-separated status match rules such as 4.*,5.*. Leave blank to use Higress defaults.

placeholder.modelIntro: Describe the positioning, target workload, and recommended scenarios of this model
placeholder.azureServiceUrlPlaceholder: It shall contain "/chat/completions" in the path and "api-version" in the query string
placeholder.ollamaServerHostPlaceholder: Please input a hostname, domain name or IP address

secretRefModal.entry: I'd like to use token info stored in a Secret resource.
secretRefModal.title: How to refer to token info stored in a Secret resource?
secretRefModal.content_brief: Aigateway supports referring to a field in a Secret resource when configuring tokens. Details are as following:
secretRefModal.content_sameNs: If the Secret and Aigateway share the same namespace:
secretRefModal.content_diffNs: If the Secret and Aigateway belong to different namespaces:
secretRefModal.roleConfig: Higress can read Secret data in any namespace by default. But if the role configuration is modified, please make sure the ServiceAccount bound to Higress Controller is allowed to read the configured Secret resource.

configForm.routeEnableHint: This drawer only controls whether the capability is enabled on the current route. Existing detailed settings are preserved and are not edited here.
configForm.globalConfigWarning: Note: Configurations above will be applied to all domains the routes. Please edit with caution.

rewrite.missingParamError: At least one of rewritten path and host shall be provided.

cors.maxAgeRequired: Please input the max cache age of pre-flight requests

custom.name: Plugin Name
custom.namePattern: Only lowercase letters, digits, dashes (-), and dots (.) are allowed, and it must start and end with a letter or digit.
custom.namePlaceholder: Only lowercase letters, digits, dashes (-), and dots (.) are allowed, and it must start and end with a letter or digit.
custom.phasePlaceholder: The sequence of phases: AuthN > AuthZ > Stats > Default
custom.priorityPlaceholder: Range from 1 to 1000. Plugins with a larger priority will execute first.

serviceSource.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete <1>{currentServiceSourceName}</1>?

serviceSourceForm.typeTooltip: Following service source types are not supported: Nacos 1.x, Nacos2.x, Zookeeper, static addresses and domains.
serviceSourceForm.name: Name
serviceSourceForm.nameRequired: Shall only contain upper-and lower-case letters, digits and dashes (-). Must begin with a letter or digit. Cannot end with a dash (-). No longer than 63 characters.
serviceSourceForm.domainTooltip: It can be either an IP address or a domain name.
serviceSourceForm.domainPlaceholder: Only following inputs are allowed: upper-and lower-case letters, numbers, dash (-) and asterisk (*). No longer than 256 characters.
serviceSourceForm.vportTooltip: Recommended when multiple instances of the same service in the registry expose different ports.
serviceSourceForm.vportDefaultTooltip: 1-65535, used when no per-service port is configured
serviceSourceForm.vportDefaultPlaceholder: Default port: Optional, 1-65535. Used when no per-service port is configured.
serviceSourceForm.vportServiceNamePlaceholder: Follow the naming format in the Service List.
serviceSourceForm.vportServicePortInvalid: Please input a valid service port.
serviceSourceForm.sniPlaceholderForDns: Leave it empty if only one domain is set and to be used as SNI.
serviceSourceForm.zkServicesPathTooltip: The root path of service registration are required for Zookeeper service sources. /dubbo and /services are listened by default. The former is the default root path of dubbo services, and the latter is the default root path of Sprin gCloud services
serviceSourceForm.zkServicesPathPlaceholder: /dubbo and /services are listened by default. The former is the default root path of dubbo service, and the latter is the default root path of Spring Cloud services.
serviceSourceForm.nacosNamespaceIdPlaceholder: Leave it empty to watch the public namespace only.
serviceSourceForm.nacosNamespaceIdRequired: Please input the ID of the Nacos namespace.
serviceSourceForm.nacos2PortNote: The port calculated by "PortAbove+1000" shall be kept accessiable as well. Otherwise, the service source won't function properly.
serviceSourceForm.servicePortPlaceholder: Any port within the range of 1-65535 is supported.
serviceSourceForm.leaveAuthUnchanged: Please leave the fields below empty to keep the saved credential.
serviceSourceForm.consulServiceTagTooltip: You can filter services by a tag in Consul service sources.
serviceSourceForm.mcpServerBaseUrlRequired: Please input MCP server route path prefix
serviceSourceForm.mcpServerBaseUrlBadFormat: Invalid MCP server route path prefix, which must begin with a "/".
serviceSourceForm.mcpServerExportDomainsPlaceholder: If left empty, MCP server will be activated on any domain.
serviceSourceForm.mcpServerExportDomainsOnlyDomainsWithRou: Only domains with at least one route are listed.
serviceSourceForm.mcpServerNacos3NoteUrl: MCP Server retrieved from Nacos can be accessed using the URL pattern below:
serviceSourceForm.mcpServerNacos3McpServerPath: MCP Server Access Path in Nacos
serviceSourceForm.mcpServerNacos3NoteSse: When accessing using SSE transport, a /sse suffix needs to be appended to the pattern above.
serviceSourceForm.mcpServerNacos3NoteRoute: Note: These MCP server routes won't be listed in the Route Management page.
serviceSourceForm.proxyServerLimitations: Note: Proxy server configuration only supports HTTPS backends with a single endpoint.

route.noCustomIngresses: Note: Only routes created from the console are listed above.

routeForm.routeNameTip: Using a name related to the business scenario is recommended. e.g.: user-default, user-gray, etc.
routeForm.routeNameRequired: Only following characters are allowed: lower-case letters, numbers and special characters (- .). And the name can not begin or end with a special character.
routeForm.routeNamePlaceholder: Only following characters are allowed: lower-case letters, numbers and special characters (- .). And the name can not begin or end with a special character.
routeForm.domainSearchPlaceholder: Search domain by name. If left empty, it will match any domain.
routeForm.matchTypeTooltip: The relation among different arguments is "and", which means the more rules are configured, the smaller the range to match is
routeForm.pathPredicateRequired: Please select a path matching predicate.
routeForm.pathMatcherRequired: Please input the path match target.
routeForm.methodMatcherPlaceholder: HTTP methods to match. Multiple selections are allowed. If left blank, it will match all the HTTP methods.
routeForm.headerTooltip: The relation among different arguments is "and".
routeForm.queryTooltip: The relation among different arguments is "and".
routeForm.customConfigsTip: Click this "?" to view the configuration guide.
routeForm.targetServiceNamedPlaceholder: Search target service by name. Multiple selections are allowed.

aigateway-config.title: Edit Global Configuration: aigateway-config
aigateway-config.note_k8s: Note: Changes to "mesh" or "meshNetworks" won't come effective until AIGateway Gateway is restarted.
aigateway-config.note_standalone: Note: Changes to "mesh" or "meshNetworks" won't come effective until AIGateway is completely restarted.

form.name: Service Name
form.upstreamPathPrefixRequired: Please input backend service path prefix
form.upstreamPathPrefixExtra: Backend service must support SSE or Streamable HTTP Transport
form.apiKeyTooltip: API Key is a simple authentication method. When clients access, they need to add credentials to requests in a specified way. The gateway will verify the validity and permissions of the API Key upon receiving requests. API Key is commonly used in simple scenarios that don't involve sensitive operations. Security is lower compared to JWT and AK/SK. Please pay attention to credential management and protection.
form.ssePathMustEndWithSse: SSE transport path must end with /sse
form.ssePathTip: SSE transport path must end with /sse
form.usePresetTemplateExtra: When enabled, built-in MCP templates can be used to initialize tool configuration, and you can still edit them later on the detail page.
form.presetTemplatesLoadFailed: Failed to load preset template list
form.presetTemplateContentLoadFailed: Failed to load preset template content

detail.dnsDesc: Aigateway does not provide domain resolution capabilities. Users need to configure business domains in DNS services themselves. You can choose appropriate record types (such as CNAME records, A records, etc.) according to actual scenarios and point them to the gateway access entry address to achieve traffic forwarding
detail.commandDesc: Please run the following command to install <1>{client}</1> MCP Server:
detail.confirmEnableAuth: Are you sure you want to enable request authentication? After enabling, only authorized users can access this MCP service.
detail.confirmDisableAuth: Are you sure you want to disable request authentication? After disabling, all users can access this MCP service.
detail.consumerNameSearchPlaceholder: Please input user name to search
detail.fetchAuthorizedConsumersError: Failed to fetch authorized user list
detail.apiKeyTooltip: API Key is a simple authentication method. When clients access, they need to add credentials to requests in a specified way. The gateway will verify the validity and permissions of the API Key upon receiving requests. API Key is commonly used in simple scenarios that don't involve sensitive operations. Security is lower compared to JWT and AK/SK. Please pay attention to credential management and protection.
detail.deleteConsumerConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
detail.cannotDeleteLastConsumer: Cannot delete the last authorized user
detail.swaggerParseError: Swagger parsing failed, please check the format
detail.swaggerParseSuccess: Swagger parsed successfully, merged into configuration
detail.swaggerModeDesc: Quickly generate tool configuration through Swagger/OpenAPI documentation, suitable for API batch import.
detail.yamlModeDesc: Directly edit complete YAML configuration, suitable for manual fine-tuning and advanced usage.
detail.yamlEditDesc: Final effective YAML configuration, can be edited directly.
